problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: If Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry is applied to at, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
